seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: The second sentence must include the keyword "demo" as a noun and convey the definition of "a demonstration of a product or service."
new_constraint: Use the keyword "demo" exclusively as a verb in the second sentence.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. The second sentence must include the keyword "demo" as a noun and convey the definition of "a demonstration of a product or service." Use the keyword "demo" exclusively as a verb in the second sentence.
response:
Subject: Request for [Your Company Name] Demo - [Product Name]

Dear [Developer Name],

I hope this email finds you well. We are very interested in learning more about [Product Name] as it relates to [briefly mention what your team does or the problem you are trying to solve]. To better understand its capabilities, could you please schedule a product **demo**, which is essentially a demonstration of the product or service? We would appreciate it if you could **demo** how the [specific feature] works for a team of [number] users.

Please let me know what times work best for you over the next week or two.

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Company]
[Your Contact Information]<turn|>
